Yes, absolutely. We use industry-leading: Yes, absolutely. We use industry-leading SSL encryption and are PCI DSS compliant. Your payment information is never stored on our servers and is processed securely through trusted payment gateways like Stripe and PayPal.
Yes, we use enterprise-grade encryption: Yes, we use enterprise-grade encryption and regularly audit our systems. Check our Compliance page for detailed security information.
Yes! We offer special pricing for bulk o: Yes! We offer special pricing for bulk orders. The discount percentage increases based on order volume. Contact our sales team at bulk@selsa.com or through our live chat for a custom quote on your specific order.
Yes! You can modify or cancel your order: Yes! You can modify or cancel your order within 1 hour of purchase. After that window, contact our support team immediately. If your order has already shipped, you can still return it within 30 days for a full refund.
